info.title: Floppa VPN Admin API
info.description: API for Floppa VPN admin panel and user management

get.summary: Telegram widget callback for deep-link flow.

307.description: Redirect to deep link with temporary code

post.summary: Exchange one-time login code for JWT + user payload.
Authenticate via Telegram Mini App initData

get.summary: Render the Telegram login page for deep-link flow.

post.summary: Create a new WireGuard peer for the current user

get.summary: Get a peer by device_id for the current user

delete.summary: Delete a peer owned by the current user

get.summary: Get WireGuard config for a peer owned by the current user

post.summary: Send WireGuard config to user via Telegram bot

delete.summary: Delete a peer by ID (admin only)

404.description: Peer not found or not active

delete.summary: Delete a plan (admin only). Fails if plan has subscriptions.

post.summary:
Pre-register a user by telegram_id and assign a subscription (admin only).
When the user later authenticates via Telegram, their account and subscription will be waiting.

400.description: Days not specified and plan has no trial_days

409.description: User with this telegram_id already exists

delete.summary: Remove all active peers for a user (admin only)

put.summary:
Set (create or replace) a user's subscription (admin only).
If the user already has an active subscription, it will be expired first.

400.description: Days not specified and plan has no trial_days

delete.summary: Delete (expire) a user's active subscription (admin only)

days.description: Duration in days. Required unless `permanent` is true.

first_name.description: Display name for the user (shown until they register and Telegram provides real name).

permanent.description: If true, creates a permanent subscription (no expiration date).

days.description:
Duration in days. If omitted, uses the plan's trial_days (for trial plans).
Use `permanent: true` to create a subscription with no expiration.

permanent.description: If true, creates a permanent subscription (no expiration date).

TelegramAuthData.description: Data received from Telegram Login Widget
